name: Outsourced AI Due Diligence
description: Third-party AI used for critical or important operational functions is subject to MiFID II outsourcing due diligence and adequate controls.
rationale: ESMA ¶14: where AI is acquired from third-party providers, firms are reminded of the MiFID II requirements regarding outsourcing of critical and important operational functions — adequate due diligence and adequate controls along the value chain.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
